source_of_truth.worktree_hint: Use the same monorepo checkout as main; lane id is main-dev.
notes: Hosted dev shares the pre-prod Swarm substrate (see foundation dev-staging) but must use an isolated platform stack: unique Pulumi stack name, subdomain, DB, Redis prefix, RabbitMQ vhost, and Swarm service labels.
Traefik hostnames follow platform config: set platform:hostname to the dev web apex (e.g. dev.sprocket.mlesports.gg) so buildHost yields web and api.dev.* URLs.

tier1.reason: Tier 1 for main-dev is not committed yet; use a maintainer-supplied profile when ready.

all.reason: Depends on Tier 1 support for this lane.

notes: Dev is not production, but still avoid destructive or spammy operations without agreement.
Replace placeholder entrypoint URLs in scripts/harness/env/main-dev.env if DNS differs from foundation dev.sprocket.mlesports.gg.
